title: Mega Empoleon
description: A pack consisting of a custom mega model for Empoleon
body:
NOTE: Mega Empoleon is not set up to be accessible outside of commands. Everyone uses a different thing for megas, so I'm just providing bare bones. That is, until I can do everything via a data pack in the future. I will, however, be providing the mega stone png.

Granted Permissions: You may set the files up however you like (connecting it through mega showdown, etc.). 

If you wish to edit the model or its texture in any way, please contact me for permission. My discord ID is Octolyte.

## Mega Empleon
**Type**: Water/Steel

**Ability**: Ice Scales

**Stats**

HP: 84

ATK: 96

DEF: 128

SpATK: 126

SpDEF: 126

Spe: 70
